title: So like what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean
display_title: So like what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean
wikitext:
[]: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Archer » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:51 pm Watching the movie never particularly elucidated the title for me. If you put a gun to my head, I’d say it’s referring to the (IRL) time periods of NGE, the Rebuilds, and the (IRL) world after the “main story” of Evangelion has finally ended (because I’m not kidding myself into believing that fluff spin-offs aren’t coming in the future, and I am fucking ready for it) but I don’t know if I’m fully satisfied with that explanation.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:11 pm It's the third ending in the franchise. EoTV, EoE and Shin Eva. I don't think Anno and staff are counting the manga.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:17 pm RussianRiz wrote: It's the third ending in the franchise. EoTV, EoE and Shin Eva. I don't think Anno and staff are counting the manga.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:22 pm It's also a quote - the title of a science fiction book: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thrice_Upon_a_Time RussianRiz wrote: It's the third ending in the franchise. EoTV, EoE and Shin Eva. I don't think Anno and staff are counting the manga.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Archer » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:22 pm RussianRiz wrote: It's the third ending in the franchise. EoTV, EoE and Shin Eva. I don't think Anno and staff are counting the manga.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:43 pm I initially thought that the first two endings would be EoE and the manga, respectively, considering EoE is arguably a retelling of the TV ending. However, Anno explicitly states in this interview that the TV ending and EoE are, in his mind, the first two endings: https://youtu.be/r_ksOBT7wYg?t=323 On a meta level, the manga couldn't count because it wasn't Anno's ending.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon Aug 16, 2021 6:44 pm pwhodges wrote: Or are counting the NGE endings as one and including the manga...

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Diego » Mon Aug 16, 2021 11:27 pm evaunit13 wrote: I initially thought that the first two endings would be EoE and the manga, respectively, considering EoE is arguably a retelling of the TV ending. However, Anno explicitly states in this interview that the TV ending and EoE are, in his mind, the first two endings: https://youtu.be/r_ksOBT7wYg?t=323 On a meta level, the manga couldn't count because it wasn't Anno's ending.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Aug 17, 2021 8:45 am RussianRiz wrote: It's the third ending in the franchise. EoTV, EoE and Shin Eva. I don't think Anno and staff are counting the manga.

[]: Re: So like, what does 3.0+1.0 actually mean?             Quote Post by Archer » Tue Aug 17, 2021 9:12 am So, to add on to this, what the hell does “3.0+1.0” actually mean?

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Ah Q » Tue Aug 17, 2021 9:39 am RussianRiz wrote: It's the third ending in the franchise. EoTV, EoE and Shin Eva. I don't think Anno and staff are counting the manga.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Lacissal » Tue Aug 17, 2021 9:44 am Anno ramming the Wunder like Misato right into Concurrency Theory there

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Tue Aug 17, 2021 9:52 am Ah Q wrote: Just throwing this out there: if this interpretation is correct, does it imply that EoTV and EoE are entirely different endings, rather than different tellings of the same ending?

[]: Re: So like, what does 3.0+1.0 actually mean?             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Tue Aug 17, 2021 9:53 am Archer wrote: So, to add on to this, what the hell does “3.0+1.0” actually mean?

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by Archer » Tue Aug 17, 2021 10:01 am Thanks for that explanation. That makes sense. I definitely see it as a 3-part story that’s been somewhat restricted by its chosen medium/release format, since 2.0 clearly needed more breathing room and 3.0/3.0+1.0 are very clearly Part 1 and Part 2 of the final act.

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Tue Aug 17, 2021 12:08 pm Ah Q wrote: Just throwing this out there: if this interpretation is correct, does it imply that EoTV and EoE are entirely different endings, rather than different tellings of the same ending?

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Aug 17, 2021 12:19 pm eldomtom2 wrote: Ah Q#929115 wrote: Just throwing this out there: if this interpretation is correct, does it imply that EoTV and EoE are entirely different endings, rather than different tellings of the same ending?

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by The_Max » Tue Aug 17, 2021 5:04 pm What does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean? Easy... Shinji, GET OUT OF THE ROBOT!

[]: Re: So like, what does Thrice Upon a Time actually mean?             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 5:17 pm pwhodges wrote: Try explaining what the actual difference is (but maybe not so much in this thread - there are already plenty on the subject).
